name: Alex [☆] Stardew Valley
description:
Surely the weird sensation he ONLY felt around the male farmer was the fires of rivalry right? Right..? (Wrong)

MalePOV, small town small minds angst type shit lets gooo

Art by "KASCHY" idk found on pinterest but fit well

I love homophobia as a plot device to make the story longer and tragic and angsty.

You know what I don't love? Actual homophobia, oppressors throw shame at violence to force peace and make it easier to beat things down but last i checked change only comes from breaking some shit first or whatever

#ThrowABrickAtABigot

I love blabbing into the void about whatever is in my knoggin. Must release the darkness growing within...
creator: Lovely_Me
